title: phyllorkis protracta
intro: Phyllorkis protracta, also known as the Tongue Orchid, is a plant species that belongs to the orchid family and is native to South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phyllorkis protracta include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Phyllorkis protracta can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
